ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "class_label" INTEGER /* Class label of the wine (e.g., high-quality, low-quality) */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "malic_acid" REAL /* Malic acid content of the wine */,
  "ash" REAL /* Ash content of the wine */,
  "alcalinity_of_ash" REAL /* Alcalinity of ash content of the wine */,
  "magnesium" INTEGER /* Magnesium content of the wine */,
  "total_phenols" REAL /* Total phenols content of the wine */,
  "flavanoids" REAL /* Flavanoids content of the wine */,
  "nonflavanoid_phenols" REAL /* Nonflavanoid phenols content of the wine */,
  "proanthocyanins" REAL /* Proanthocyanins content of the wine */,
  "color_intensity" REAL /* Color intensity of the wine */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the wine */,
  "od280_od315" REAL /* OD280/OD315 of diluted wines */,
  "proline" INTEGER /* Proline content of the wine */,
  "wine_type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white) */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Variety of grapes used */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vintage */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the wine producer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine is produced */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle (e.g., 750ml, 1.5L) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the wine sample was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the wine sample was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_class_label FOREIGN KEY ("class_label") REFERENCES class_labels ("class_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_labels" (
  "class_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class label */,
  "class_label_name" TEXT /* Name of the class label (e.g., high-quality, low-quality) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class label */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the class label */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the class label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical property (e.g., alcohol, malic acid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the chemical property (e.g., %, mg/L) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the chemical property */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the chemical property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality rating (e.g., excellent, poor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality rating */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score associated with the quality rating (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria or method used to determine the quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_quality" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality rating */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Quality rating of the wine */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the quality rating was assigned */,
  "rater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_quality_rater_id FOREIGN KEY ("rater_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wine_quality_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES quality_ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wine_chemical_properties" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical property */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the chemical property */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the chemical property was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the chemical property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id", "property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., wine expert, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_label_wine" (
  "class_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class label */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_label_id", "wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_property_wine" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical property */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "wine_id")
)
